programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch yesterday's Pontefract.

programme.title: Mark Your Card
programme.desc: A preview of the day's racing with live news from the courses.

programme.title: Live Racing
programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Nottingham, Warwick and the Curragh.

programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Warwick and Nottingham.

programme.title: Irish Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from the Curragh.

programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Warwick and Nottingham.

programme.title: Irish Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch yesterday's racing action from the Curragh.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Moto3 Grand Prix of Italy.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Moto2 Grand Prix of Italy.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Italy sprint race.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Italy.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM - The Wrap Up
programme.desc: A look back at all of the biggest stories and best action from the 17th round of fixtures, including Bristol Bears v Bath Rugby, Saracens v Harlequins, and more.

programme.title: The Gruppetto
programme.desc: Rob Hatch presents news from the world of cycling.

programme.title: Men's Cycling Pro Series
programme.desc: Action from the second stage of the Tour of Wallonia.

programme.title: Women's Giro d'Italia
programme.desc: Action from the fourth stage of the race.

programme.title: Roland Garros
programme.desc: Action from the 10th day of the tournament.

programme.title: Live: Roland Garros 360
programme.desc: Coverage from around the courts on day 11 of the Grand Slam tournament at Stade Roland Garros in Paris, featuring quarter-final matches.

programme.title: Live: Roland Garros
programme.desc: Further coverage from the second day of the quarter-finals of the tournament, which takes place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from Group B of the last eight of the Pairs Cup.

programme.title: Live: Roland Garros
programme.desc: Further coverage from the second day of the quarter-finals of the tournament, which takes place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. In last year's women's singles quarter-finals eventual winner Coco Gauff beat fellow American Madison Keys 6-7, 6-4, 6-1 to make it to the semi-finals, while 2025 runner-up Aryna Sabalenka beat China's Zheng Qinwen 7-6, 6-3. Iga Swiatek and Lois Boisson also claimed quar

programme.title: Women's Giro d'Italia
programme.desc: Action from the fifth stage of the race.

programme.title: Men's Cycling Pro Series
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Mercan'Tour Classic.

programme.title: Men's Cycling Pro Series
programme.desc: Action from the third stage of the Tour of Wallonia.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 24 SMU Mustangs visit the No. 6 Duke Blue Devils at Cameron Indoor Stadium. The freshman phenom Cameron Boozer leads Duke in scoring 23.3 PPG and rebounding 9.7 RPG. The engine of the Mustangs, Boopie Miller, scores 20.6 PPG and 7.1 APG.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Stanford hosts No. 6 Duke for an ACC game at Maples Pavilion. Duke is 4-0 on the road, led by Cameron Boozer's 22.9 PPG. The Cardinal looks to Ebuka Okorie, who averages 22.1 PPG. The Blue Devils' offense faces a tough road test in California.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: From Cameron Indoor Stadium in Durham, N.C.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 4 Duke (21-1) visits No. 14 North Carolina (18-4) in the Tobacco Road rivalry. UNC beat Syracuse 87-77 and Duke beat Boston College 67-49. The Blue Devils rely on freshman Cameron Boozer, who leads the nation with 23.5 points per game.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Pittsburgh hosts No. 4 Duke at Petersen Events Center. The Blue Devils lead the series 18-7 since 2002 and won Jan. 24. The game features a mentor-student clash between Pitt's Jeff Capel and his former Duke pupil, Jon Scheyer, in an ACC showdown.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 4 Duke Blue Devils host No. 20 Clemson Tigers in a battle between the ACC's top two teams. The Blue Devils aim to maintain their unbeaten home record as Caleb Foster leads the charge against a high-scoring Tigers squad in Durham.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Adrian Autry and the Orange face No. 4 Duke at Cameron Indoor Stadium for an ACC matchup Feb. 16. The Blue Devils have won 10 straight against Syracuse since 2019. In their last meeting Feb. 5, 2025, Duke secured a dominant 83-54 road victory.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 1 Wolverines face the No. 3 Blue Devils on a neutral floor for the seventh time in series history. Michigan seeks its first win over Duke since 2011, while Jon Scheyer's squad aims to bolster its case for a No. 1 seed in the NCAA tournament.

programme.title: 7Innings Live
programme.desc: Top college athletes compete for school pride and championship glory.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hot dog stands to steakhouses; Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: John T. Edge travels around the region, introducing viewers to Southern tastemakers, food, culture and history.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The subject of endless magazine listicles and breathless influencer reels; is it possible to sidestep the algorithms and really see and hear and taste Charleston?

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 1 Blue Devils travel to face Wolfpack. Darrion Williams leads the Wolfpack in scoring, while Cameron Boozer utilizes superior footwork to score through contact for the Blue Devils. The top spot in the ACC hangs in the balance here.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 1 Blue Devils host the No. 17 Tar Heels at Cameron Indoor Stadium in Durham. Duke sits atop the ACC standings with North Carolina in fourth place. North Carolina won the first meeting of the season in a dramatic fashion defeating Duke 71-68.

programme.title: 2026 Women's College World Series
programme.desc: From Devon Park in Oklahoma City, Okla.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Florida State and Duke meet in the ACC Tournament quarterfinals. Despite Duke's dominance, the teams are tied 1-1 in tournament meetings. The Blue Devils won the only regular-season matchup, a 91-87 victory in Tallahassee on Jan. 3.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Duke Blue Devils face the Clemson Tigers in the semifinals of the ACC Men's Basketball Tournament. The winner of this matchup will advance to the ACC Championship game. Cameron Boozer leads No. 1 seed Duke in scoring, rebounds, and assists.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: T. Rowe Price ACC Tournament concludes as No.1 Duke and No.10 Virginia fight for the title. The Blue Devils won the regular-season meeting, but the Cavaliers have won four straight games. A spot in the NCAA Tournament as a top seed is on the line.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: College basketball blue bloods duel as the No. 25 Tar Heels (1-0) host the No. 19 Jayhawks (1-0). North Carolina hasn't defeated Kansas since Nov. 27, 2002, dropping four tournament clashes, including the 2022 final, and a 92-89 decision last season.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Storied programs in the No. 5 Blue Devils and No. 24 Jayhawks meet in the Champions Classic. Duke freshman forward Cameron Boozer, son of former Blue Devils star Carlos, averages 22.5 points per game after dropping 35 in his last outing.

programme.title: 7Innings Live
programme.desc: Top college athletes compete for school pride and championship glory.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Daikin Park in Houston.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Daikin Park in Houston.

programme.title: Fight Sports Martial Arts
programme.desc: Coverage of judo, sumo, karate and other disciplines of martial arts.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Chiyotairyu, Ryuden, Asanoyama and Takarafuji.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From Tokyo, Ryogoku Kokugikan, Show 1.

programme.title: In Depth With Graham Bensinger
programme.desc: Sometimes polarizing, always popular, "In Depth" looks back at the life of NASCAR legend Kyle Busch. We hear from Kyle's wife, brother, and others in his inner circle.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Daikin Park in Houston.

programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.desc: Bobby Vermillion and other locally-known talent, celebrities and guests provide new information for today's golfer.

programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: The Snap Count with Charlie Batch and Trai Essex
The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Daikin Park in Houston.

programme.title: Diggin' Deep
programme.desc: A conversation with Paul Rudd.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Houston Astros host the Pittsburgh Pirates in Game 3 of a three-game regular MLB series. Right-handed pitcher Kai-Wei Teng starts. Pittsburgh outfielder Bryan Reynolds and Houston outfielder Yordan Alvarez anchor the lineups in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Michael Jordan is left to begin the 1997-98 season without his injured sidekick Scottie Pippen, whose contract dispute with the Bulls' front office reaches a fever pitch as the team gets off to one of the worst starts of its championship runs.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Once a key member of the hated Detroit Pistons' "Bad Boys" championship teams that brutalized Michael Jordan, Dennis Rodman is virtually all Jordan can count on in the early months of the 1997-98 season.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: In what management insists is Phil Jackson's final season in Chicago as head coach of the Bulls, he continues to seem like the only one who can steer this unique, singular collection of talent to another title.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: 2026 Stanley Cup Final
programme.desc: The Hurricanes and Golden Knights clash in Game 1 of the best-of-seven Stanley Cup Final. Carolina brings a stellar 12-1 playoff record into the series, while Vegas responds with a 12-5 postseason mark after sweeping its prior round.

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Seattle Mariners v New York Mets (Start-time 8.40pm). Coverage of the inter-league match from T-Mobile Park. These two sides last met in New York last August when the Mariners won a three-match series 2-1. The Mets won the first meeting 11-9 in a thrilling match before Seattle fought back to win the last two games 3-1 and 7-3.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Philadelphia Phillies v San Diego Padres (Start-time 11.40pm). Coverage of the National League match from Citizens Bank Park.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Test Cricket Highlights

programme.title: Discovery Golf
programme.desc: A weekly show featuring the latest news from the world of golf.

programme.title: UFC
programme.desc: Song Yadong v Deiveson Figueiredo.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from Group B of the last eight of the Pairs Cup.

programme.title: IFSC Climbing World Series Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the latest round of the season in Madrid, Spain.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at Rally Japan.

programme.title: NWSL
programme.desc: Racing Louisville FC v Denver Summit.

programme.title: NWSL
programme.desc: Washington Spirit v Seattle Reign.

programme.title: UEFA Conference League Goals Reload
programme.desc: A look back at the best goals from the quarter-finals, semi-finals and final.

programme.title: No Filter Football
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the UEFA Champions League final.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: A review of the eighth round of the season in Korea.

programme.title: Live: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Coverage from the first day of the ninth round of the season, which takes place at Real Club Valderrama in Sotogrande, Spain.

programme.title: It's A Numbers Game
programme.desc: Exploring the unique role that maths and science play in sport. Presented by Dr Hannah Fry, Pippa Monique, Ugo Monye, Andrew Mensah and Dr Nick Owen.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Philadelphia Phillies v San Diego Padres (Start-time 6.05pm). Coverage of the National League match from Citizens Bank Park.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: UFC Main Event
programme.desc: A look back at the main event of UFC 318 at the Smoothie King Center in New Orleans.

programme.title: UFC
programme.desc: Song Yadong v Deiveson Figueiredo.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Stanley Cup Final
programme.desc: The Hurricanes and Golden Knights clash in Game 1 of the best-of-seven Stanley Cup Final. Carolina brings a stellar 12-1 playoff record into the series, while Vegas responds with a 12-5 postseason mark after sweeping its prior round.

programme.title: Live: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From June 2, 2026.

programme.desc: Game 7, from June 2, 2026.

programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Stanley Cup Playoffs Rewind
programme.desc: Game 7, from June 2. 2026.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays and Braves square off to launch a highly competitive three-game regular set. Kazuma Okamoto leads Toronto with 12 home runs, while Drake Baldwin responds with 13 homers for Atlanta. Both teams fight to maintain strong positioning.

programme.title: Live: Blair & Barker
programme.desc: Jeff Blair and Kevin Barker talk all things Blue Jays, and Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays face the Atlanta Braves at Truist Park for game two of a three-game series in Atlanta. Left-handed pitcher Patrick Corbin is the projected starter for the Blue Jays against left-handed pitcher Chris Sale for the Braves.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Season 12
programme.desc: Competitors challenge each other in high-stakes poker matches.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight: First Shift
programme.desc: A conversational style show featuring hard-hitting opinions and analysis on the news of the day, the daily program will be co-hosted by longtime NHL Network broadcaster EJ Hradek and a rotating group of NHL Network analysts.

programme.title: Live: NHL Now
programme.desc: Gear up for the night's hockey action with expert pregame analysis, exclusive insight from morning skates, and reporting from correspondents around the league.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Countdown
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays face the Atlanta Braves at Truist Park for game two of a three-game series in Atlanta. Left-handed pitcher Patrick Corbin is the projected starter for the Blue Jays against left-handed pitcher Chris Sale for the Braves.

programme.title: Canada in the Rough
programme.desc: Kevin Beasley is archery hunting black bears in Northern Ontario and also gets into some giant walleye, with "Pasha Lake".

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: An expert forager and chef shows how people can find food on state land. A Michigan Conservation Officer find a campfire that's unattended.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: The team is still at the Buck Daze event in Georgia on a deer hunt!

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve takes Evan Hafer, lead singer of Turnpike Troubadours, on his first Alaskan black bear hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger runs into trouble with a neighbor as he hunts for a trophy buck in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Canada in the Rough
programme.desc: Kevin Beasley is archery hunting black bears in Northern Ontario and also gets into some giant walleye, with "Pasha Lake".

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: An expert forager and chef shows how people can find food on state land. A Michigan Conservation Officer find a campfire that's unattended.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Trekin Outdoors
programme.desc: Uncle Steve, Chris and Tyler of Trekin Outdoors take you into the real and raw realties of everyday hunting. Chasing big game across public and private lands. Showcasing the challenges that ordianry outdoorsman face.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style.

programme.title: Canada in the Rough
programme.desc: Kevin Beasley is archery hunting black bears in Northern Ontario and also gets into some giant walleye, with "Pasha Lake".

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Young Captain Reed Tudor hosts Captain Mike in Duck Key, FL and puts him on Micro Tarpon, Redfish and Goliath Grouper.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Professional angler Chris Lane searches across Florida for large bass amid lightning and thunder.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Kris Johnson is a professional fishing guide who not only helps his clients reel in great catches but also shares meaningful lessons from each trip. He takes pride in offering more than just a day on the water-providing inspiration, reflection, and a deeper connection to the creator.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Fundamental to the existence of In-Fisherman is the pioneering spirit to discover the hottest presentations happening for any given season; so the staff highlights the most productive new crawfish soft trailers for largemouth bass.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original-an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger runs into trouble with a neighbor as he hunts for a trophy buck in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Curt Wells and grandsons Easton, Carson, make the most of their spring turkey hunt along with their friend Parker.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild exciting adventures.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick relives one of his most memorable elk hunts of all time with his Grandpa in Colorado.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Conservation mission to live capture and study jaguars.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures: Fishing with Wesley
programme.desc: Wesley White travels to Brazil to fish for Arapaima and before flying into the Rio Negro River.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action-packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straightforward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platf

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: The Burtons participate in Virginia's Youth and Apprentice Deer Hunting Weekend with Easton.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week we have Banks Murphy and Grant Boies, and they are after turkeys.

programme.title: Trekin Outdoors
programme.desc: Uncle Steve, Chris and Tyler of Trekin Outdoors take you into the real and raw realties of everyday hunting. Chasing big game across public and private lands. Showcasing the challenges that ordianry outdoorsman face.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In Colorado, King partners with RSI Outdoors' owner, Tarry Bratton, and visits HARTEIS RANCH with Freddy, harvesting his first Colorado antelope.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: This week, we're talking about grabbling catfish! Our guests Geoffrey King, Corey Stouts, and Ted Swords of North Mississippi are experts in the art of grabbling. Each has caught catfish over 70 pounds with their bare hands.

programme.title: Guns & Gear TV
programme.desc: Crimson Trace, Black Hills Ammo and Steiner launch new products. Tisas and XS Sights have some BIG announcements too!

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland and Andy Young fish the wide-open waters of Mille Lacs Lake using ActiveTarget forward-facing sonar, spotting big smallmouth bass around isolated boulders in 20-25 ft of water and catching them on Ned rigs with light fluorocarbon.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Outdoor sporting and recreational events for everyone.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Conservation mission to live capture and study jaguars.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: Mastering the perfect shot isn't luck, it's science, strategy and precision; breaking down the fundamentals every bowhunter needs to harvest mature bucks.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Jax heads to Alaska with Melissa and Ben to experience an incredible black bear adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: Trekin Outdoors
programme.desc: Uncle Steve, Chris and Tyler of Trekin Outdoors take you into the real and raw realties of everyday hunting. Chasing big game across public and private lands. Showcasing the challenges that ordianry outdoorsman face.

programme.title: MTN Top Outdoors
programme.desc: Hunting, fishing and wild game cooking from the woods of Southwestern Pennsylvania to the bountiful walleye waters of the Great Lakes Region.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: Mastering the perfect shot isn't luck, it's science, strategy and precision; breaking down the fundamentals every bowhunter needs to harvest mature bucks.

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From T-Mobile Park in Seattle.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.desc: The best moments, important races, action and highlights from MotoGP-related competitions.

programme.desc: A look at the best stories from around the world of sports.

programme.title: Premiership Rugby

programme.title: By the Books
programme.desc: Host Dave Ross, with the latest betting information to get you set for your day.

programme.title: The Next Bite
programme.desc: Jason and Jay Przekurat dissect their home waters on the Wisconsin River in search of big fall-time smallmouth.

programme.title: Texas Team Trail
programme.desc: Cabela's Texas Team Trail presented by Progressive is back at Sam Rayburn Reservoir, but this time, only the top teams from the season are competing on this famed reservoir for the CHAMPIONSHIP title!; tune in for all the day one action.

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour
programme.desc: The 2025 Power-Pole National Redfish Tour: Top 50 National Championship held at Sweetwater Marina in Delaccroix, Louisiana - Part 2.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: Profile of Ron Weber, the American angler who discovered the Rapala lure, the most famous lure in the world.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: We're going into the world of saltwater in this episode of the Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook. We'll look at a variety of fishing trips to showcase redfishing, speckled trout as well as the tactics to catch them. We'll also take an in depth look at the Ranger Boats Saltwater lineup, and we'll go back in time on a redfishing adventure in Louisiana. Stay tuned as we highlight the gear, techniqu

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Charlie and Ben are joined by Baltimore Raven and college angler Ben Cleveland for a great day of summertime ledge fishing on Kentucky Lake.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Al Lindner and Mike Hehner spotlight northern sunfish varieties and their hybrid offspring.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Fundamental to the existence of In-Fisherman is the pioneering spirit to discover the hottest presentations happening for any given season; so the staff highlights the most productive new crawfish soft trailers for largemouth bass.

programme.title: Jokers Wild off the Hook
programme.desc: Sparky goes fishing with Black Fish in Port Alfred South Africa.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: Larry teams up with Tony and Kevan for some multi-species action on Clear Lake.

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Jon explores hidden river backwaters where spring walleyes stack up in surprising numbers. He reveals how to pick apart subtle current and cover transitions for steady action. After the storm rolls in, he shows how to capitalize on the rebound - when post-storm walleyes feed hard and pattern shifts create prime windows.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Bill joins Peter Deeks for some tremendous trout fishin' along the Space Coast of Florida!

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: Bill is Tennessee River bound this week to catch some flat heads & blues with his good friend, Chris Stout.
